blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No test exists for overdue derived state detection. The assertion requires a unit test confirming that in_progress tasks past due_at but within 15 minutes show as 'overdue but active' without a stored status change. No isOverdueActive helper or equivalent test was found in any test file under agent/src/__tests__/. This is a UI-derived state that may be implemented in the web dashboard milestone instead.

appliedUpdates.description: Created .factory/library/user-testing.md with testing surface documentation, test file mapping, concurrency guidance, and flow validator guidance for Vitest CLI
